import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let lines = string.split(text, "\n")
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < lines.len()
    match lines.get(i)
    when Some(line)
      let trimmed = string.trim(line)
      if string.is_empty(trimmed)
        sum = sum
      else
        let tokens = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
        match tokens.get(1)
        when Some(tok)
          match string.parse_int(tok)
          when Some(n)
            sum = sum + n
          when None
            sum = sum
          end
        when None
          sum = sum
        end
      end
    when None
      sum = sum
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("sum=#{sum}")
end
